invariants.name: additivity
invariants.description: The minimum spanning tree weight decomposes into the sum of minimum costs required to cross each of the n-1 adjacent cuts. Because all valid extra edges span contiguous intervals, the optimal connection cost for each adjacent gap can be determined independently, allowing the global optimum to be computed via direct summation.

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: The algorithm maintains a running candidate minimum that extends unidirectionally across the array as long as the divisibility condition holds. Upon encountering a non-multiple, the candidate resets to the current element, ensuring each position is processed in a single forward or backward sweep without backtracking or re-evaluation.
